data.title: imToken releases security statement: Wallet private key randomness is safe, no users are affected
data.description: imToken has issued a security statement addressing concerns regarding the randomness of its non-custodial wallet private keys, sparked by recent US law enforcement news. Officials stated that users of both the imToken software wallet and the imKey hardware wallet are unaffected. The statement notes that the imToken software wallet generates private keys locally using a secure random number source on iOS and Android. Its core codebase, TokenCore, has been open source and auditable since 2018, and private keys are never transmitted over the internet. The imKey hardware wallet uses a true random number generator (TRNG) within its secure chip to generate mnemonics and private keys. imToken emphasizes that both products are non-custodial and do not store user private keys or mnemonics. Users are reminded to properly back up their mnemonics.

data.title: Bitcoin market sentiment turns to extreme fear as BTC sinks to $105k
data.description:
Bitcoin’s Fear & Greed Index drops to 22, signaling extreme fear in the crypto market. BTC falls 13% in a week to $105,600, triggering a sharp decline in investor sentiment. Extreme fear may hint at a potential market bottom, but uncertainty remains high
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/bitcoin-market-sentiment-turns-to-extreme-fear-as-btc-sinks-to-105k/

data.title: Binance Alpha: Merlin Chain (MERL) Second Airdrop Launches, Claiming Requirement: 240 Points
data.description: Binance Alpha has announced the second wave of Merlin Chain (MERL) airdrops. Users with at least 240 Binance Alpha Points can claim a 125-MERL airdrop on the Alpha event page. The minimum number of points will automatically decrease by 15 every hour until all rewards are distributed. Please note that claiming the airdrop will cost 15 Binance Alpha Points, and users must complete their claim within 24 hours; otherwise, the airdrop will be forfeited.

data.title: UK tax authority doubles crypto warning letters in crackdown on unpaid gains
data.description:
HMRC sent nearly 65,000 warning letters to crypto investors last year, more than double the previous year, as the UK steps up efforts to trace undeclared capital gains.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/uk-tax-authority-doubles-crypto-warning-letters-hmrc-crackdown?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3Fr%3Dtdmfv6%26cb%3Dtdmfv6%26cachebust%3Dtrue&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Binance: Users who meet the points requirements can claim the Alpha airdrop at 4 PM today
data.description: Binance has officially announced that users should be ready to claim the Binance Alpha airdrop today at 4:00 PM (UTC). Users with at least 240 Binance Alpha Points can claim tokens on a first-come, first-served basis until the airdrop pool is fully allocated or the airdrop expires.

data.title: Circle's USDC Circulation Sees Increase Over Recent Week
data.description: According to PANews, official data reveals that Circle issued approximately 7.6 billion USDC and redeemed around 7.2 billion USDC in the week ending October 16, resulting in a net increase of 400 million USDC in circulation. The total circulation of USDC now stands at 75.9 billion tokens. Circle's reserves amount to approximately $76.1 billion, with $9.9 billion held in cash and $66.2 billion managed by the Circle Reserve Fund.
